name: Terra Luna Classic
description: Algorithmic stablecoin UST kehilangan peg, menyebabkan death spiral hyperinflation pada LUNA. Dari $119 ke $0.0001 dalam beberapa hari.

name: FTX Token
description: Token native FTX exchange. Setelah leak balance sheet Alameda dan bank run, FTX bangkrut. Sam Bankman-Fried ditangkap karena fraud.

name: Squid Game Token
description: Token dari developer anonim yang ride hype Squid Game Netflix. Holder tidak bisa jual. Developer kabur dengan $3.3M.

name: Bitconnect
description: Skema Ponzi terbesar dalam sejarah crypto awal. Dari $463 ke nol setelah cease & desist. Founder masih buron sampai 2026.

name: OneCoin
description: Skema Ponzi yang dipasarkan sebagai 'Bitcoin Killer'. Tidak pernah ada blockchain. Founder Ruja Ignatova hilang sampai sekarang.

name: SafeMoon
description: Token dengan tokenomics reflective. Founder John Karony ditangkap SEC karena fraud dan market manipulation. Token kolaps.

name: Celsius Network Token
description: Lending platform Celsius bangkrut setelah freeze withdrawal. CEO Alex Mashinsky ditangkap karena fraud.

name: Anubis DAO
description: DAO yang ngangkat hype dari Olympus DAO fork. Developer kabur dengan $60M ETH dalam 20 jam setelah launch.

name: Iron Finance
description: Algorithmic stablecoin yang mengalami bank run. Token TITAN dari $64 ke nol dalam beberapa jam. Mark Cuban kena.

name: Wonderland
description: DeFi protocol yang CFO-nya ternyata Michael Patryn alias 0xSifu, co-founder QuadrigaCX yang sudah convicted. Kepercayaan hilang, harga kolaps.

name: Beanstalk Farms
description: Stablecoin protocol kena flash loan governance attack. Hacker pinjam $1B, vote proposal jahat, drain $182M.

name: Mt. Gox Token
description: Mt. Gox dulu menangani 70% volume Bitcoin global. Hack 850.000 BTC, exchange bangkrut. Kasus repayment masih berlanjut sampai sekarang.

name: QuadrigaCX
description: Exchange Canada yang founder-nya 'meninggal' di India sambil bawa private key. Investigasi mengungkap Ponzi scheme.

name: KlimaDAO
description: Carbon credit DeFi protocol fork OlympusDAO. Dari $3000 ke $2. Banyak fork OlympusDAO mati pada periode ini akibat ponzinomics.

name: Frosties NFT
description: NFT collection 8.888 ice cream art. Sehari setelah mint sukses, founder pseudonymous menghilangkan semua dana dan website. Founder DOJ tangkap.

name: Evolved Apes NFT
description: 10K NFT collection. Developer 'Evil Ape' ambil 798 ETH (~$2.7M) seminggu setelah mint dan menghilang. Tidak ada game yang dijanjikan.

name: Big Daddy Ape Club
description: Solana NFT yang collect 9000 SOL ($1.3M) lalu founder kabur. Solscan + Metaplex blacklist mereka.

name: Voyager Token
description: Crypto broker app bangkrut setelah exposure ke 3AC. Filed Chapter 11 bankruptcy.

name: Three Arrows Capital
description: Hedge fund crypto $10B kolaps karena over-leveraged dan exposure ke Luna. Founder Su Zhu dan Kyle Davies kabur.

name: Genesis Trading
description: Crypto lender bangkrut setelah FTX collapse. Owe $3B ke creditor.

name: BlockFi
description: Crypto lender filed Chapter 11 setelah FTX exposure. SEC fine $100M sebelumnya.

name: Mirror Protocol
description: Synthetic asset protocol di Terra. Mati bersamaan dengan Luna collapse. Token MIR dari $14 ke $0.001.

name: Saber Protocol
description: Stablecoin DEX di Solana. Founder Ian Macalinao reveal pakai 11 alias untuk inflate TVL DefiLlama. Reputation ruined.

name: MOBOX
description: Gaming GameFi project di BSC kena exploit deployer key. Token dari $0.30 ke $0.01.

name: Multichain
description: Cross-chain bridge protocol. CEO Zhaojun ditangkap di China bawa private key. $1.5B asset terkunci, project effectively dead.

name: Ronin Bridge
description: Bridge Ronin (untuk Axie Infinity) kena hack Lazarus Group North Korea. $625M dicuri. Axie token tidak pernah recover.

name: Poly Network
description: Cross-chain protocol kena hack $611M. Hacker kembalikan dana setelah jadi viral. Poly Network masih jalan tapi reputation rusak.

name: Axie Infinity SLP
description: Token in-game Axie Infinity. P2E hype ends, infinite supply tanpa demand bikin token dari $0.40 ke $0.001.

name: STEPN GMT
description: Move-to-earn app yang viral 2022. Dari $4.10 ke $0.13. Tokenomics tidak sustainable, user habis.

name: Hex
description: Token Richard Heart yang di-promote sebagai 'first blockchain CD'. SEC charge fraud. Dari $0.50 ke $0.003.

name: PlusToken
description: Ponzi scheme asal China dengan 3 juta member. Operator kabur dengan 200K BTC + 800K ETH. Police tangkap 109 orang.

name: PancakeBunny
description: BSC DeFi protocol kena flash loan attack $200M. Token dari $146 ke $4. Tidak pernah recover.

name: Cream Finance
description: Lending protocol kena flash loan attack $130M. Sebelumnya juga sudah kena hack 2x ($37M dan $19M). Project effectively dead.

name: Bondly Finance
description: DeFi project kena private key compromise. Hacker mint unlimited token, dump ke market. Token dari $1.50 ke $0.01.

name: Africrypt
description: Exchange Afrika Selatan dimana 2 saudara Cajee kabur dengan 69.000 BTC. Salah satu exit scam terbesar.

name: Mining Capital Coin
description: Crypto mining ponzi yang menjual 'mining packages'. Founder Luiz Capuci ditangkap DOJ. $62M dari 65.000 investor.

name: GalaxyCoin
description: Token gaming yang rug pull setelah 2 bulan. Liquidity dipindah, kontrak abandoned.

name: Prodeum
description: ICO yang menghilang setelah raising $11M. Website cuma tinggal kata 'penis'. Salah satu rug pull paling absurd.

name: Confido
description: ICO yang founder-nya kabur 4 hari setelah ICO selesai. Klasik rug pull era ICO 2017.

name: Centra Tech
description: ICO yang di-endorse Floyd Mayweather dan DJ Khaled. Ternyata fraud, founder ditangkap. Mayweather kena fine SEC.

name: Africoin Exchange
description: Exchange Afrika lokal yang rug pull setelah 6 bulan. Tidak ada audit, tidak ada listing recovery.

name: Bee Token
description: Decentralized Airbnb. Project abandoned setelah token kolaps. Tidak pernah ada produk yang launching.

name: Centrality CENNZ
description: Project blockchain Selandia Baru. Token CENNZ delisted dari semua major exchange. Team disband.

name: Bancor
description: Pioneer DEX yang menjanjikan 'Impermanent Loss Protection'. Saat market crash, mereka pause IL protection. Trust hancur.

name: Olympus DAO
description: Pioneer (3,3) game theory dengan staking 8000% APY. Dari $1300 ke $9. Banyak fork ikut hancur.

name: Wonderland TIME
description: Fork OlympusDAO di Avalanche. Hancur setelah CFO terbukti criminal QuadrigaCX. Dari $9000 ke $50.

name: Pickle Finance
description: Yield aggregator kena exploit smart contract. Lost $19.7M dari jar cDAI. Token tidak pernah recover.

name: EasyFi
description: Lending protocol Polygon kena private key compromise. Hacker mint 2.98M EZ token, dump ke market.

name: Spartan Protocol
description: BSC AMM kena flash loan attack $30M. Pool draining bug. Token tidak pernah recover.

name: Belt Finance
description: BSC yield protocol kena flash loan attack 8x. Hacker drain $50M. Token kolaps dari $50 ke $2.

name: Burgerswap
description: BSC DEX kena flash loan attack. Token tidak pernah balik ke peak. Project mostly abandoned.

name: DODO
description: DEX kena initialization bug. Hacker drain crowdpooling smart contract. Hacker kembalikan 70%, sisanya hilang.

name: Yam Finance v1
description: DeFi yang viral 2020 kena bug rebase. Treasury terkunci forever. v1 mati, di-restart sebagai v2/v3.

name: Fei Protocol
description: Algorithmic stablecoin yang launch dengan $1.3B TVL. Tidak pernah maintain peg. Akhirnya merge dengan Tribe DAO dan disband.

name: Empty Set Dollar
description: Algorithmic stablecoin generation 1. Tokenomics tidak sustainable, peg break, project abandoned.

name: Basis Cash
description: Algorithmic stablecoin clone Basis Protocol. Peg gagal, BAC kolaps ke $0.10, BAS dan BAB jadi worthless.

name: DGTX Digitex
description: Exchange futures yang janjikan 'zero fees'. Founder Adam Todd tuduh team-nya, project disband.

name: Banana Token
description: Memecoin BSC yang rug pull setelah 3 bulan. Liquidity removed, contract abandoned.

name: Karen Coin
description: Joke memecoin yang viral 1 minggu lalu rug pull. Klasik low-cap meme rug.

name: Mando Token
description: Star Wars themed token. Founder klaim partnership dengan Disney (palsu). Rug setelah 1 bulan.

name: Save the Kids Token
description: Token yang di-promote influencer FaZe Clan dan Kay. Insider dump terbukti. Reputation hancur, project mati.

name: Bored Bunny NFT
description: NFT collection yang di-promote celebrity. Founder kabur, NFT floor price drop ke 0.01 ETH dari 1+ ETH.

name: Sudorare
description: NFT marketplace fork SudoSwap + LooksRare. 6 jam setelah launch, founder transfer 519 ETH dan menghilang.

name: Polywhale
description: Polygon yield farm yang founder-nya tiba-tiba menghilang. TVL turun dari $300M ke $0.

name: PaidNetwork
description: Smart contract bug let hacker mint 60M PAID. Dump ke market, token dari $2.50 ke $0.20. Tidak recover.

name: TurtleDex
description: BSC yield aggregator yang rug pull setelah 1 minggu launch. Founder transfer 9000 BNB lalu menghilang.

name: Meerkat Finance
description: BSC yield protocol. 1 hari setelah launch, 'hack' $31M. Investigasi mengungkap inside job.

name: ThodexCoin
description: Exchange Turki yang founder Faruk Fatih Ozer kabur dengan $2B aset 391.000 user. Ditangkap 2022 di Albania.

name: Africrypt 2
description: Exchange South Africa kena 'hack', tapi investigasi mengungkap exit scam. Founder kabur.

name: Mirror Trading
description: South Africa Bitcoin trading platform. Ponzi scheme terbesar 2020. Founder Johann Steynberg ditangkap di Brazil 2021.

name: Cumrocket
description: Adult NFT memecoin yang viral 2021. Founder Cleopatra menghilang, project effectively dead.

name: Boring Protocol
description: Solana VPN protocol. Tidak pernah deliver produk. Token delisted, team menghilang dari sosmed.

name: Star Atlas
description: Solana metaverse game ambisius. Hype 2021 dengan $0.20, sekarang $0.001. Game tidak pernah launching mainnet.

name: Aurora Bee
description: BSC yield farm yang rug pull setelah 2 bulan. Liquidity gone, contract abandoned.

name: Pirate Chain
description: Privacy coin yang exchange listing makin terbatas akibat regulation. Volume tipis, dev team mostly inactive.

name: PRIZM
description: Russian/CIS crypto Ponzi. ParaMining structure dengan referral. Banyak korban di Eropa Timur.

name: Ormeus Coin
description: Mining-backed coin. Founder John Barksdale ditangkap karena fraud $124M. SEC charge.

name: BitMart Token
description: Exchange BitMart kena hack $196M dari hot wallet. Token kena dump, exchange struggling.

name: Cryptopia
description: Exchange New Zealand kena hack $16M. Liquidation 2019. Repayment masih belum complete.

name: Bittrex
description: Exchange US shutdown US operations. Filed Chapter 11 bankruptcy. SEC charges securities violations.

name: Vauld
description: Lending platform Singapore freeze withdrawal Juli 2022. Filed restructuring. User dana terkunci.

name: Hodlnaut
description: Singapore lending platform dengan exposure ke Luna. Freeze withdrawal, judicial management.

name: Babel Finance
description: Hong Kong crypto lender freeze withdrawal Juni 2022. Lost $280M dari prop trading position.

name: Finiko
description: Russian Ponzi scheme dengan 800.000 victims. Founder Kirill Doronin ditangkap. $1.5B dari 1 juta investor.

name: Pincoin/iFan
description: Vietnam ICO scam terbesar. Modern Tech raise $660M dari 32.000 investor lalu menghilang.

name: Mantra Fall
description: Token RWA Mantra crash 90% dalam 1 jam dari $6 ke $0.50. Dituduh insider dump dan team selling.

name: WazirX Hack
description: Exchange India terbesar kena hack $230M oleh Lazarus Group. Withdrawal di-pause permanently.

name: DMM Bitcoin
description: Exchange Jepang kena hack 4502 BTC. Liquidation Desember 2024, transfer ke SBI VC Trade.

name: Mixin Network
description: Hong Kong DeFi network kena cloud service hack. $200M asset stolen. Reputation hancur.

name: Stake.com Hack
description: Crypto casino kena hack $41M oleh Lazarus Group. Hot wallet keys stolen.

name: Nirvana Finance
description: Solana DeFi kena flash loan attack. Token ANA dari $9 ke $0.001. Tidak pernah recover.

name: Vee Finance
description: Avalanche lending protocol kena oracle attack. $35M drained. Project tidak pernah recover.

name: MonoX Finance
description: DEX kena exploit smart contract bug. Hacker swap MONO/MONO untuk drain pool. $31M lost.

name: Vulcan Forged
description: Gaming platform kena hack 96 wallet user. Team refund partial. Token tidak pernah balik ke peak.

name: Grim Finance
description: Fantom yield aggregator kena reentrancy attack. $30M drained. Token kolaps.

name: Visor Finance
description: Active LP management protocol kena hack via supply chain attack. Token VISR dari $1.20 ke $0.02.

name: Qubit Finance
description: BSC lending protocol kena bridge exploit. 206.809 wETH minted dari nol. Token QBT kolaps total.

name: Wormhole Bridge
description: Bridge Solana-Ethereum kena hack $320M (120K wETH). Jump Crypto bailout, tapi reputation rusak.

name: Harmony Horizon Bridge
description: Bridge Harmony kena hack $100M oleh Lazarus Group. Token ONE tidak pernah recover.

name: Nomad Bridge
description: Cross-chain bridge kena 'free-for-all' hack akibat init bug. Ratusan address ikut drain $190M.

name: Allbridge
description: Cross-chain bridge kena flash loan attack. Hacker partial return $400K. Project still running tapi reputation rusak.

name: Atlantis Loans
description: BSC lending protocol exploit governance. Anonymous attacker upgrade contract dan drain user wallet.

name: Merlin DEX
description: zkSync DEX yang core developer rug pull saat liquidity event. CertiK audited tapi tetap rug.

name: OneRing Finance
description: Fantom stablecoin yield aggregator kena flash loan attack. Token kolaps, project abandoned.

name: ZB Exchange Token
description: Exchange ZB kena hack hot wallet. $4.9M drained dari 21 token berbeda. Trading dipause.

name: Deus Finance
description: Fantom DeFi kena flash loan attack 2x dalam 1 bulan. Lost $13.4M total. Token kolaps 90%.

name: Inverse Finance
description: Lending protocol kena price oracle manipulation attack. Lost $15.6M. Token INV tidak pernah recover.

name: Mango Markets
description: Solana DEX kena oracle manipulation oleh Avraham Eisenberg. $117M drained. Eisenberg ditangkap dan dihukum.

name: Solend
description: Solana lending protocol propose 'take over' whale wallet untuk avoid liquidation cascade. Reputation rusak.

name: FortressDAO
description: Avalanche DAO yang founder rug pull treasury $14M. Klasik OlympusDAO fork rug.

name: Snowdog DAO
description: Avalanche memecoin DAO. 'Buyback event' ternyata insider trading. Token dari $7000 ke $20.

name: Compounder Finance
description: Yield aggregator yang dev rug pull governance. Update contract upgradable, drain user funds.

name: ICO Box
description: ICO incubator era 2018. SEC investigate, project abandoned, token delisted dari major exchange.

name: Tezos ICO Lawsuit
description: Tezos ICO 2017 raise $232M. Founder dispute internal bikin project delayed 1 tahun. SEC class action settled $25M.

name: Veritaseum
description: ICO Reggie Middleton di-charge SEC karena unregistered securities offering. Settled $9.5M.

name: Munchee Token
description: First SEC enforcement action ICO. Cease & desist letter, refund investor.

name: BeeFi
description: BSC DeFi yield. Founder remove liquidity dan menghilang setelah 2 bulan launch.

name: Defi100
description: BSC DeFi yang website tertulis 'we scammed you guys'. $32M hilang. Klasik exit scam blatant.

name: Uranium Finance
description: BSC DEX kena migration bug. $50M drained selama upgrade contract. Project mati.

name: TheNorthBridge
description: Cross-chain bridge yang dev abandoned setelah TVL drop. User asset terkunci.
